nasb.text: and divide the booty between the warriors who went out to battle and all the congregation.

esv.text: and divide the plunder into two parts between the warriors who went out to battle and all the congregation.

cnv.text: 你要把掠奪得的分為兩半，一半給出去打仗的人，一半給全體會眾。

ccb.text: 然后把这些战利品分成两份，一份给出征的战士，一份给会众。
